metrics.name: Task Success Rate
metrics.description: Percentage of scheduled tasks that complete without error

metrics.name: Average Task Duration
metrics.description: Mean execution time per task type

metrics.name: Tasks Run
metrics.description: Total tasks executed in the tracking period

metrics.name: Loop Guard Triggers
metrics.description: Number of times loop guard halted a runaway task

metrics.name: Token Budget Usage
metrics.description: Percentage of session token budget consumed

metrics.name: Cloud Dispatch Latency
metrics.description: Time from dispatch request to GitHub Actions workflow start
